title: Small Uncrewed Aircraft Systems (SUAS) in Divisional Brigades
description: The authors assessed the implications of integrating additional uncrewed aircraft systems (UASs) for reconnaissance, fires, and other purposes below the division level. They derived implications for institutional and unit training and other institutional functions needed for success.
